name: CRM
description: Customer Relationship Management — contacts, leads, companies, and deals

actions.name: list_leads
actions.description: List leads with pipeline stage filter

actions.name: create_deal
actions.description: Create a deal linked to a lead

migration_up: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255), phone VARCHAR(50), company_id UUID, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_leads (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL, contact_id UUID REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, stage VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new', value DECIMAL(12,2), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_companies (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, domain VARCHAR(255), industry VARCHAR(100), size VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_deals (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL, lead_id UUID REFERENCES crm_leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(12,2), stage VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'qualification', close_date DATE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
migration_down: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS crm_deals CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS crm_leads CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS crm_companies CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS crm_contacts CASCADE;
